files.description: Concrete implementations: SimpleExecutionModel, InMemoryPortfolioBook, SymbolBacktestEngine. Includes _to_date() helper and _iter_dates() generator.
Add imports of three new concrete classes; extend __all__ to include all six names.
5 pytest tests covering AC#9a, AC#9b, AC#9c.

implementation_notes.SimpleExecutionModel: Injected data_provider at __init__; fills at close price; None bar no fill; fee=0.0 always.
implementation_notes.InMemoryPortfolioBook: Tracks _cash, _holdings, _last_prices; NAV = cash + sum(qty*price); initial_cash configurable.
implementation_notes.SymbolBacktestEngine: Single symbol; run() iterates every calendar day inclusive; strict event sequence; BacktestResult with final_nav, total_return, num_trades; equity_curve_ref=None.
implementation_notes.edge_cases: Zero-cash division guard, empty signal_source, None-bar fallback, 1-day window.

risks: InMemoryPortfolioBook NAV uses last fill price (stale price acceptable per event-sequence contract)
Calendar-day iteration includes weekends (harmless, no market-data = empty fills)
